steps.t: Fríthild may be found within the Mead Hall of Stoke, within the town. Húlac asked you to speak with Fríthild, his Reeve, and learn her wishes.
Wooden planks can be found throughout the town of Stoke. Fríthild asked you to gather wooden planks with which to repair the barricades at the town ga…
Damaged barricades can be found at the gates to the north-western, north-eastern, and southern parts of the town of Stoke. Fríthild asked you to repai…
Fríthild awaits your return in the Mead Hall of Stoke. You should return to Fríthild and inform her that you have done as she asked.
